msg: warning: Variable thisopt is a dead store!
reasoning: When !HAVE_TLSV1_X, SSL_PROTOCOL_TLSV1_1 is not declared (the #define is guarded by #ifdef HAVE_TLSV1_X). Line 13 ('thisopt = SSL_PROTOCOL_TLSV1_1;') would fail to compile in this configuration due to an undeclared identifier — exactly the UndeclaredIdentifier bug documented in vbdb (1a3c8e3) for !HAVE_TLSV1_X. Reporting this as a dead_store is incorrect: there is no dead store in code that cannot compile. The tool is misclassifying the compile error as a dead store. False positive.
